steps.title: Translate the rental cost structure
steps.content:
The cost is $92 for the first day, then $46 for each additional day. For $d$ days, there is 1 first day plus $(d-1)$ additional days:
$$C(d) = 92 + 46(d-1)$$

steps.title: Simplify and match the answer
steps.content:
Distribute the 46 and combine constants:
$$C(d) = 92 + 46d - 46 = 46d + 46$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
